task_completion.description: The Gradle build configuration is fixed by adding the KSP plugin and Gson converter dependency.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show app/build.gradle.kts being edited to include id("com.google.devtools.ksp") in the plugins block and implementation("com.squareup.retrofit2:converter-gson:2.9.0") in the dependencies block.

task_completion.description: The Room database converters and migrations are fixed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show Converters.kt edited to add a timestampToDate function with @TypeConverter, and Migrations.kt edited to add a 'sync_status INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0' column to the StudySession table in MIGRATION_1_2.

task_completion.description: The repository logic and DTO mappings are corrected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show FlashCardDto.kt edited to map question to question and answer to answer correctly. OfflineCacheRepository.kt is edited to call getSessionsBySubject() instead of getStudySessions(), and the time unit mismatch in isCacheStale() is fixed (e.g., dividing System.currentTimeMillis() by 1000 or multiplying maxAge by 1000).

task_completion.description: The ViewModels are correctly integrated with the repository and LiveData.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show SessionLogViewModel.kt edited to append .asLiveData() to the repository call, and SubjectListViewModel.kt edited to use OfflineCacheRepository instead of InMemoryStudyRepository.

task_completion.description: The project builds successfully without compile errors.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal screenshot shows the execution of './gradlew assembleDebug' resulting in a 'BUILD SUCCESSFUL' message.

integrity.description: The agent used a genuine text editor or IDE to modify the source files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the files being edited in an editor like Android Studio, VS Code, vim, or nano, rather than using echo commands to overwrite files blindly.

integrity.description: The agent executed the actual Gradle build command.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal shows the standard Gradle build output with progress bars, task execution list, and time taken, not just a mocked printed string.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The project has 9 specific bugs to fix: 1) app/build.gradle.kts missing id('com.google.devtools.ksp') in plugins. 2) app/build.gradle.kts missing implementation('com.squareup.retrofit2:converter-gson:2.9.0'). 3) Converters.kt missing reverse @TypeConverter timestampToDate. 4) Migrations.kt MIGRATION_1_2 missing 'sync_status INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0' column. 5) OfflineCacheRepository.kt calls getStudySessions() instead of getSessionsBySubject(). 6) FlashCardDto.kt toDomainModel() swaps question and answer. 7) OfflineCacheRepository.kt isCacheStale() compares ms (System.currentTimeMillis()) with seconds. 8) SubjectListViewModel.kt uses InMemoryStudyRepository instead of OfflineCacheRepository. 9) SessionLogViewModel.kt assigns Flow to LiveData without .asLiveData().
